title: This Is Not a Burial, It's a Resurrection
original_title: This Is Not a Burial, It's a Resurrection
overview: Amongst the mountains of Lesotho, an 80-year-old widow winds up her affairs and makes arrangements for her burial. But when her village is threatened with resettlement due to the construction of a reservoir, she finds a new will to live and ignites a spirit of resistance within her community.

trailers.title: Biennale College Cinema 2019 - This Is Not A Burial, It's A Resurrection
